_comment: Real, generated (not hand-written) output of core/incident_engine.py's IncidentEngine.raise_or_update, produced by running agents/pr_impact/analyzer.py's analyze_files against a FakeDataHubClient seeded to mirror seed/seed_datahub.py, for a PR that drops discount_pct from analytics.orders_v1. This is the Incident model Sentinel raises via DataHubClient.raise_incident -- see the audit-trail requirement in core/incident_engine.py's module docstring (which agent raised it, and why, is always in the description, not just 'quality check failed').
